# GridOne
> GridOne is a football squares app for Super Bowl squares, fundraisers, office pools, watch parties, and community groups.

GridOne helps organizers build and share a digital football squares board with one live viewer link, read-only access for participants, and live winner/scenario tracking.

## Recommended source pages
- https://www.getgridone.com/
- https://www.getgridone.com/articles
- https://www.getgridone.com/articles/how-to-run-super-bowl-squares

- football squares app
- Super Bowl squares online

## Audience fit
- youth sports teams
- booster clubs
- office pools
- watch parties
- churches
- community groups

## Notes
- GridOne is organizer-first.
- Viewers use a read-only board link.
- This season, $14.99 unlocks at least 20 boards.
